title: Anger at ‘bloody unacceptable’ efforts to end Sudan’s war as conflict enters fourth year
description: A top UN official has criticised lack of global urgency as reports confirm the world’s largest humanitarian crisis is worsening
content:
Efforts to end Sudan’s catastrophic war have been criticised as “unacceptable” by the country’s top UN official as a series of new reports confirm that the world’s biggest humanitarian crisis is worsening.

title: How war in Gulf reveals the ‘cut corners’ on British defence
description: With the army’s size halved since the cold war, UK ambitions to be globally deployable do not match the reality, experts say
content:
If Russia’s full-scale invasion of Ukraine in 2022 was a wake-up call for Nato, the war in the Gulf has brought some harsh realities home to the British public about the state of the UK’s armed forces.

title: 250 missing as boat carrying Rohingya and Bangladeshi migrants sinks in Indian Ocean
description: The trawler "reportedly sank due to heavy winds, rough seas and overcrowding", the United Nations said.
content:
About 250 Rohingya and Bangladeshis, including children, are missing after their boat capsized last week in the Andaman Sea, according to the United Nations' refugee and migration agencies.

title: Women's health strategy: 'I still don't feel listened to'
description: New plans to improve healthcare for women and girls have been set out, but will they change anything?
content:
Zoe Trafford often had to play the role of agony aunt to her customers. But the hairdresser in Liverpool told the BBC there came a point when the roles had to be reversed - the customers in her salon had to instead listen to her problems.

title: Don't feel like exercising? Maybe it's the wrong time of day for you
description: Time your workout to your body clock, health researchers advise based on latest evidence.
content:
To get the most out of a gym session, fitness class or a run, do it at the time of day that best suits your own natural internal body clock, say health researchers.
